title: DeprecatedParameters
content:
# DeprecatedParameters

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### update_parameters_app_version(app_name: str, version: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.ParametersAppVersionUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Bulk update Parameters for multiple resources of a given App Version. Parameters belonging to the App Version but not specified in the payload will **not** be changed. Setting a value to `null` will cause the parameter to be unset.  Additionally, it's also possible to set a comment for each parameter change.


### list_parameters_definitions(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.ParametersDefinitionsList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.ParameterDefinitionItem], responses.ParametersDefinitionsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Parameters and its definition in each App. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### list_resource_parameters(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.ResourceParametersList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.ParameterValueHistorianItem], responses.ResourceParametersListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Parameters and all values for each Resource. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### get_parameters_values(data: Optional[Union[requests.ParametersValuesGet, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.ParametersValuesGet

Returns a list of all unique values for each Parameter. Default values will not be shown. If the App is not specified, then the response will be grouped by App Name.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.deprecated_parameters.update_parameters_app_version()
